'''鈭歵h-zh-p-z''' ('''kathazhpezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vase|vase]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vase|vase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-zh-p-z
|-
! Lemma
| kathazhpezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazhpezoko|thithazhpezoko]] || [[word:jithazhpezoko|jithazhpezoko]] || [[word:shithazhpezoko|shithazhpezoko]] || [[word:kithazhpezoko|kithazhpezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothazhpezoko|thothazhpezoko]] || [[word:jothazhpezoko|jothazhpezoko]] || [[word:shothazhpezoko|shothazhpezoko]] || [[word:kothazhpezoko|kothazhpezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
